name: Liberty Financial Group
analysis: LFG's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 28% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (0.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$3.1300, stop A$3.0492, target A$3.4953 (4.52:1) — then trail it.
